name: blueprint-implementer
description: A desktop authoring environment for writing structured markdown blueprints and implementing them into executable applications using the Copilot SDK.

scripts.install-cli: node build.mjs && cd cli && npm pack && npm install -g blueprint-1.0.0.tgz && rm blueprint-1.0.0.tgz
scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p scripts && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eugene1g/agent-safehouse/main/dist/safehouse.sh -o scripts/safehouse && chmod +x scripts/safehouse && chmod +x node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds/darwin-*/spawn-helper 2>/dev/null || true
